series_metadata.series_description: Submittals from owners requesting revocation of unit operations. Notice to mineral owners of a revocation order, including mailed letters, returned mail, and proof of mailing. This retention schedule does not include Chief's Orders to revoke unit operations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Chief's Order unit operations has been revoked. If records are scanned into an electronic format, paper copy may be recycled at that time. ; Electronic: Chief's Order unit operations has been revoked
